name: Essence Existing Magic Body Armour
description: You already have a magic body armour — decide whether to commit currency. If the magic mods are Life or Resistance, essence to lock them in alongside Life. If they're filler, discarding and using a fresh white base is cleaner.

steps.verb: Decide: is this base worth essencing?
steps.outcome: → IF your current magic mods include Life, Energy Shield, or any Resistance: GO. → IF they're filler (raw armour/evasion %, generic stats): the essence preserves them as dead weight. Discard and start with a fresh white body armour for a cleaner result, OR proceed if you're explicitly going budget.
Magic → Rare with the existing magic mod(s) preserved and the essence's guaranteed +maximum Life added on top.
Each Exalt adds one random modifier (cap of 6 total). Aim for at least 2 resistance rolls; if you already had one from the magic step you typically only need ~2 Exalts to finish.

notes_for_user: Good when your magic base already has Life or a Resistance. For STR-base armours (Plate Vest etc.) the guaranteed Life prefix tiers higher than on EV/ES bases. Advanced: 'Omen of Sinistral Exaltation' forces prefix-only Exalts, useful for locking defensive prefixes when the magic already filled one suffix slot.
